markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract Renewed:** The Yourco-GrowthX partnership is renewed for another year.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [**Strong 12-Month Growth:** Keyword rankings grew across all positions, with the strongest gains in the critical 1–10 slots.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Gaps:** Scrunch analysis revealed Yourco is not cited for key queries like "best employee communication tools for frontline workers," indicating a major content opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**New Content Priorities:** Focus on manufacturing-specific content and enriching high-traffic use case pages, starting with "Company Announcement."](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & QA

  - [**Production Status:** 4 articles are ready for review; the 5th will be submitted today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**QA Issue:** H3s are appearing double-bolded in Prismic due to a Google Docs paste error.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [**Action:** Jessica to confirm the issue; GrowthX will adjust Google Docs settings to prevent recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

### Performance Review: 12-Month Snapshot

  - [**Keyword Rankings:** Strong growth across all positions (1–40), with the most significant gains in the 1–10 slots.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Top Articles:** High-performing articles (e.g., "communication structure") offer a key opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Link new, high-impact content to these articles to leverage their authority.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Cluster Growth:** All content clusters are growing.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** "Workforce management strategy," "Operational efficiency," and "Templates."](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### AI Visibility & Scrunch Analysis

  - [**Scrunch Tool:** Used to analyze Yourco's visibility in LLM responses (e.g., ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**Key Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Strong Citation:** Yourco is a top citation for "How do I communicate with non-desk employees who don't have email access?"](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Major Gap:** Yourco is not cited for "best employee communication tools for frontline workers," despite its direct relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Action:** Use Scrunch to identify content gaps and test enrichment strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [**Employee Surveys:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A top-performing topic, supported by an upcoming feature rollout and the "Frontline Intelligence" initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [**Action:** Enrich existing survey content with "Frontline Intelligence" angles.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Manufacturing Industry:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with a current national priority ("bring back manufacturing").](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [**Action:** Create new, manufacturing-specific content and prioritize related enrichments.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**Use Case Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High traffic, with "Company Announcement" having the most clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [**Action:** Prioritize creating new content for the "Company Announcement" and "Employee Referrals" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [**Suggestion:** Include templates on the "Company Announcement" page.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Review 4 articles in Prismic.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Confirm the H3 double-bolding issue.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
      - [Connect Scrunch to Google Analytics to view AI referral data.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Submit the 5th article for review.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Analyze performance of all employee survey content.](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [Prioritize content creation for "Company Announcement" and "Employee Referrals."](https://fathom.video/share/o78yRzH-xxbWfTxgW2vFLtj3kHSvFe-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
